name: perfanno
description: Annotates source code with perf information.

commands.title: Perfanno: Clear stored default paths to report files

perfanno.eventOutputType.description: The output format for virtual text when annotating.

perfanno.localRelative.description: Whether to show count relative to enclosing symbol (high sample count recommended).

perfanno.highlightColor.description: The color of the highlight in hex (ex: #FF0000 for red).

perfanno.minimumThreshold.description: The minimum percentage threshold for annotating (0.0-1.0).

perfanno.perfFile.description: Perf data file to search for in project root. Will prompt with finder if file does not exist. Can be a file path (ex: 'perf.output' or 'path/to/perf.txt').

perfanno.pyspyFile.description: Py-Spy raw file to search for in project root. Will prompt with finder if file does not exist. Can be a file path (ex: 'path/to/pyspy.txt').

perfanno.onlyLocalLeaf.description: Collapse each trace to its deepest in-workspace frame (the one that actually has self() time), hiding earlier project parents; external frames are left intact. Reload perf file to apply.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
